root_cause: see.domSnapshot and see.accessibilityTree return the Webfuse extension overlay page, not the co-browsed page. The includeShadowDom option is not recognized by the current API version. WF-IDs are assigned to extension elements, not page elements.
blocker: Perception layer returns wrong document. Until domSnapshot returns the co-browsed page content, shadow DOM piercing cannot be tested via WF-IDs.

tests.label: Snapshot WITHOUT includeShadowDom
tests.detail: Returns extension overlay (2676 chars, no gym content)

tests.label: Shadow content in snapshot
tests.detail: Snapshot does not contain gym page at all

tests.label: WF-IDs on shadow elements
tests.detail: WF-IDs only on extension overlay elements

tests.label: Type by WF-ID into shadow
tests.detail: No WF-IDs available for shadow content

tests.label: Click by WF-ID shadow button
tests.detail: No WF-IDs available for shadow content
